paragraph: Northvale is a single-family dominated market with 17 sales over the last seven months at a median of $795,000. Sellers are dictating terms here. Nearly two-thirds of homes are selling above asking, the sale-to-list ratio is sitting at 1.00, and the median time on market is 15 days. When you see those numbers together, you're looking at a real seller's market where priced homes are moving fast and multiple offer situations are common. The range is wide, from $535,000 to $1,490,000, so the market rewards precision in pricing and preparation. If you're selling, this is your window. If you're buying, you'll need to move decisively on the right property and be ready to compete.
